ticket_text:
[Connectivity Problems with Printer on MacBook Pro]
Dear Support Team,

I am reporting a recurring issue with the Laser Printer when printing from MacBook Pros running macOS 15. Several team members have recently encountered this problem, which appears to be connected to the latest macOS 15 system updates.

We believe the root cause might be a driver compatibility issue due to the updated operating systems or printer firmware. To troubleshoot, we have restarted the printers and MacBook devices, reinstalled the printer drivers, and verified configurations.
conversation_snippet: Thank you for reaching out regarding the connectivity problems with the Laser Printer on MacBook Pros after recent macOS 15 updates. We understand how disruptive this can be and appreciate your efforts in troubleshooting so far. To assist you further, please confirm the specific MacBook model and current macOS version you are using (including whether you have iOS devices like iPhones or iPads). Also, provide the model and driver version of the Laser Printer installed. Meanwhile, we recommend...
